words.definition_vi: rút gọn lại, quy về (một vấn đề cơ bản); phụ thuộc vào
words.definition_en: to be reduced to a basic or essential point; to depend on
words.example_sentence: The success of the project comes down to careful planning and team coordination.

words.definition_vi: loại bỏ, thoát khỏi, giải phóng khỏi
words.definition_en: to remove or dispose of something unwanted; to free oneself from
words.example_sentence: The government implemented policies to get rid of plastic waste in urban areas.

words.definition_vi: tính đến, xem xét, lưu ý đến
words.definition_en: to consider or include something as an important factor in a decision
words.example_sentence: When designing sustainable cities, planners must take into account climate change and population growth.

words.definition_vi: đưa vào, giới thiệu, mang lại (lợi nhuận, doanh thu)
words.definition_en: to introduce something new; to generate income or profit
words.example_sentence: The company decided to bring in new technologies to improve productivity and bring in higher revenues.

words.definition_vi: chịu đựng, chấp nhận (điều khó chịu)
words.definition_en: to tolerate or accept something unpleasant without complaint
words.example_sentence: Workers in developing countries often have to put up with poor working conditions and low wages.

words.definition_vi: chú ý, cảnh báo, tìm kiếm, chăm sóc
words.definition_en: to watch carefully for something; to be alert to danger; to care for someone
words.example_sentence: Environmental scientists look out for signs of climate change in ocean temperature data.

words.definition_en: to manage without something; to do without a necessity or comfort
words.example_sentence: Many families in rural areas go without access to clean water and electricity.

words.definition_vi: yêu cầu, kêu gọi, đòi hỏi, cần thiết
words.definition_en: to demand or require something; to appeal for action or support
words.example_sentence: The report calls for immediate action to reduce carbon emissions and combat global warming.

words.definition_vi: cất cánh (máy bay); bắt đầu thành công; bỏ đi
words.definition_en: to leave the ground (aircraft); to become successful; to remove
words.example_sentence: The startup's innovative app took off rapidly after receiving positive reviews from tech influencers.

words.definition_vi: hiểu rõ, phân biệt; lập danh sách; tuyên bố
words.definition_en: to understand or perceive something; to write out a document; to claim or suggest
words.example_sentence: Researchers make out that renewable energy sources will become more cost-effective than fossil fuels within the next decade.
